name: GOLFTEC Liberty Lake
address: 1310 N Whitman Ln Suite 101, Liberty Lake, WA 99019
about: GOLFTEC Liberty Lake is a high-tech golf training facility that provides data-driven instruction using advanced motion tracking and launch monitor technology. The studio offers personalized golf lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships in a controlled indoor environment with simulator bays. Sessions are structured around specific improvement plans, leveraging technology like OPTIMOTION and high-speed video to analyze and enhance swings. The venue caters to golfers looking for systematic skill development and equipment optimization through expert coaching and cutting-edge analysis tools.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and high-speed cameras
Professional club fitting with launch monitors and shaft optimization for personalized equipment
Structured practice plans and coaching focused on measurable improvement
Access to training bays with launch monitors and video feedback

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for fitting and practice sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and offers custom club fitting services to match you with equipment suited to your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed. The venue focuses on golf training without on-site dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC doesn't offer traditional 18-hole simulation; sessions are structured around lessons, practice, or club fitting, typically lasting 45-60 minutes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and technology-focused coaching that can benefit young golfers learning the game.
